metadata.description: Rigorous verification of all 28 BibTeX references for the NHB2026 manuscript submission. Checking author names, titles, years, venues, URLs/DOIs, and volume/issue/pages against web sources.

summary: Verified all 28 BibTeX references in references.bib against web sources. Found 8 entries with issues: cheung2024 (wrong year, should be 2025), kawakami2024 (wrong venue CHI vs C&C, malformed author field), jiang2023 (wrong first author name), mccormack2019 (wrong authors listed), pane2025 (published in journal not preprint), aoi2025 (suspicious URL), sichach2025 (may be 2024 not 2025), varvasovszky2000 (title may be more specific). 20 references verified clean.

contribution.description: Systematic verification of all 28 BibTeX references for the NHB2026/Scientific Reports manuscript. Each reference checked against web sources for author names, title accuracy, year, venue, and URL/DOI validity. Found 8 references with issues requiring correction.

annotation.content: Multiple BibTeX references have issues: (1) cheung2024generative is listed as year 2024 but was published 2025 (DOI contains 2025); (2) kawakami2024impact lists venue as CHI but it was actually Creativity & Cognition (C&C); (3) jiang2023aiart lists author as 'Jiajun' but actual first author is 'Harry H. Jiang'; (4) mccormack2019autonomy includes wrong authors (Llano Rodriguez, Yee-King are from a different collaboration); (5) cheung2024generative author initial 'S.' should be 'Sarah'; (6) pane2025postdigital listed as ResearchGate Preprint but actually published in methaodos.revista de ciencias sociales; (7) aoi2025coalition URL appears to point to wrong page; (8) kawakami2024impact author field is malformed.
